content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
Kris M. Becker 
City of El Centro 
Office of the City Attorney 
1275 Main Street 
El Centro, CA 92243 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-12-088 
Dear Ms. Becker: 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
June 12, 2012 
This correspondence is written confinnation that the Fair Political Practices Commission 
has withdrawn your May 22, 2012, request for advice under the provisions of the Political 
Reform Act, 1 on behalf of Council member Jason Jackson, after providing Councilmember 
Jackson verbal assistance at his request on June 5, 2012. Consequently, no response will be 
prepared, and your request is withdrawn. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
BGL:jgl 
t.. 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
By: 
Brian G. Lau 
Counsel, Legal Division 
t The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 8 l000 through 91014. All statu1ory 
references are to the Government Code. unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: Councilmember Jason Jackson sought advice regarding compliance with the Political Reform Act, though the specific legal question is not detailed in this withdrawal letter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC withdrew the advice request after providing verbal assistance to Councilmember Jackson on June 5, 2012, and no written response will be prepared.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms verbal advice was provided and request is withdrawn. Original request date: May 22, 2012; verbal assistance date: June 5, 2012.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Councilmember Jason Jackson sought advice regarding compliance with the Political Reform Act, though the specific legal question is not detailed in this withdrawal letter.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC withdrew the advice request after providing verbal assistance to Councilmember Jackson on June 5, 2012, and no written response will be prepared.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter confirming that the FPPC has withdrawn an advice request from the City of El Centro on behalf of Councilmember Jason Jackson after providing verbal assistance. No further written response will be provided.
